sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8788" key="a)nqoko/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθο-κόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8788.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">decked with flowers, flowery,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λειμῶνες</foreign> ib. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.6</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>). </sense> <sense n="2" id="n8788.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parti-coloured,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἰωνοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:190" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.190</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
